data.title: RED: Write failing tests for performance_overlay classifier flag
data.description:
## Description
Add failing tests for the performance_overlay boolean flag to tests/hooks/test-review-complexity-classifier.sh.

### Test approach
Create diff fixtures containing performance-sensitive file paths (db/, database/, cache/, query/), patterns in diff content (SELECT, INSERT, async def, await, pool, cursor). Run the classifier and assert performance_overlay=true. Create non-performance fixture and assert performance_overlay=false.

### Files to modify
- tests/hooks/test-review-complexity-classifier.sh

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Performance tests run and FAIL (RED) — performance_overlay still hardcoded false
  Verify: bash tests/hooks/test-review-complexity-classifier.sh 2>&1 | grep -q "FAIL"
- [ ] At least 4 test cases: db path, cache path, SQL in diff, non-performance path
  Verify: grep -c "test_performance_overlay" tests/hooks/test-review-complexity-classifier.sh | awk '{exit ($1 < 4)}'
